MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE (to Marin County)

Appearances: Ross McKissick of the Harris Personal Injury Lawyers, Inc. (415.495.0440) for plaintiff; Brent Llanos of the Department of Transportation (510.433.9100) for the State of California; David Casarrubias-Gonzalez of Hanson Bridget LLP (415.777.3200) for Golden Gate Bridge, Highway and Transportation; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant State of California's unopposed motion for change of venue is granted. Plaintiff shall pay the transfer costs. Order signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)
